title: What's new with Gemini from Google DeepMind
summary: Google DeepMind announces upgrades to Gemini including improved model reasoning, expanded context window processing, and enhanced multimodal tool use. The update emphasizes support for agentic applications in Vertex AI and advances in agent design research.
writeup: This video covers Google DeepMind's latest Gemini upgrades: improved model reasoning, an expanded context window, and enhanced multimodal tool use. It matters because the update is framed around agentic applications, with explicit support in Vertex AI and accompanying advances in agent design research. The concrete takeaways are stronger long-context reasoning, broader multimodal capability, and tooling aimed at building agentic workflows.
